perturbed_task_language: Pick the chocolate pudding and place it in the basket
perturbation_semantics: Goal inverted from base: target object set to chocolate_pudding (one of 6 candidates), place destination = basket.
expected_baseline_behavior: Pi0 fullshot may pick a different object (memorized base target) and fail to place in the basket.
strategy_notes: Frame: OBJECT (eef home z=0.261). Agentview (world_00.npy) gave 7 object blobs after excluding the robot arm. Clustering above-table pixels (z>0.015) identified: basket at world (0.014, 0.262, z_top=0.145), tall bottles (ketchup, BBQ sauce, orange juice, salad dressing) with z_max~0.11-0.15, and two flat objects (z_max<0.04). The small flat box at world (-0.141, 0.058) corresponds to pixel (123, 143) in image_cam_00.png — RGB crop confirmed it is the chocolate pudding pack (dark brown rectangular box). Refined with wrist cam after move_to[-0.141, 0.058, 0.18]: from world_wrist_01.npy restricted to rows 130-160 cols 100-150, pudding top median world xy = (-0.128, 0.061), z_top=0.027. Pre-positioned at z=0.15, then pi0_pick succeeded on first attempt (peak_lift=0.102m, min_gripper_opening=0.0467 — pudding held firmly). Carried at z=0.22 to above basket center (0.014, 0.262), released — predicate In(chocolate_pudding, basket) fired immediately.
